query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `menu_categories` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `owner_id` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('food','drink') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'food',
  `description` text,
  `sort_order` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `menu_categories_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `menu_category_items` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `category_id` int NOT NULL,
  `owner_id` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `pricing_type` enum('per_person','per_item') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'per_person',
  `price` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `unit` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'person',
  `available` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `allergens` varchar(500),
  `sort_order` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `menu_category_items_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

  `type` enum('food','drink') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'food',
  `description` text,

  CONSTRAINT `menu_categories_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `menu_category_items` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `category_id` int NOT NULL,
  `owner_id` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `pricing_type` enum('per_person','per_item') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'per_person',
  `price` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `unit` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'person',
  `available` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
